title: Beanstalk - REKT
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls Diamond.vote() or Diamond.emergencyCommit() after a flash loan in the same tx
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> Diamond.vote() or Diamond.emergencyCommit() in single tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls Diamond.vote() or Diamond.emergencyCommit() after a flash loan in the same tx
summary: A malicious governance proposal was pushed through using a flash loan, allowing the attacker to drain the protocol. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing voting after a flash loan.
